name: Verbose Output
description: Produce detailed step-by-step output with reasoning.

name: Strict Mode
description: Enforce strict validation, fail on any warning.

name: Responsive
description: Validate responsive layouts and breakpoint behavior using the live browser and recordings.

name: Mobile
description: Run a dedicated phone-sized viewport pass and capture mobile-specific behavior in the browser and recordings.

name: Tablet/iPad
description: Run a dedicated tablet-sized viewport pass (1024x768) and capture tablet-specific layout issues in the browser and recordings.
